artistString: onewP, PinocchioP feat. Hatsune Miku Append (Solid)
name: God-Tier Tune

pvs.author: ikuy398
pvs.description:
Welcome to the Niconico world!

Author's Comment (translated):
"What's this?"

Music, Lyrics: гҒҠгҒ«гӮ…гҒҶP (Onyuu P)
Arrangement, Guitar, Mixing, Mastering: гғ”гғҺгӮӯгӮӘP (Pinocchio P)
Movie: Sui
From http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm13452778

Note:
God Song = зҘһжӣІ is generally translated to masterpiece or epic song. But they didn't fit the story, I did literally.

-----
Translated Lyrics:

They say it's a god song, it's a god video game
God bargain sale flooding the streets

They may be thin contents like paper, but
I'm saved by such a thing and so

It was music, a song, a picture, or a dream
They are the frothy universe
I'm saved by things I believe in

They say it's a god video, it's a god TV program
Gods at a giveaway price flooding the world

They may be thin and fluttering down like hair, but
I'm saved by such a thing and so

It was vegetation, a desert, the air, or a water surface
They are the ordinary universe
I'm saved by things I notice

I can't possibly become a hero like a myth
I can't possibly become the omnipotent, but
I want to get not GOD but GOOD
And want to be the salvation of somebody

That is... That isвҖ”
You, me, buddy, or friend
We futile guys want to be saved and save each other

We compose music, sing a song,
draw a picture, and have a dream
They are the tiny universe
We're saved by somebody today as usual
pvs.name: Hatsune Miku - God Song (зҘһжӣІ) - English/Romaji Subs
